problem_definition.description: A clear one-sentence statement of the decision the user is trying to make.

decision_type.description: A short category label for the decision, such as career, business, education, or general.

options.description: A concise list of realistic options or courses of action the user could choose from.

key_factors.description: The most important criteria, constraints, or variables that should drive the decision.

risks.description: The main risks, downsides, or failure modes associated with the decision or options.

unknowns.description: Important missing information, assumptions, or uncertainties that reduce confidence in the decision.

recommended_next_questions.description: Helpful follow-up questions that would improve the quality of the decision if answered.
